verdict.outlook: indexes range-bound, volatility normal, offensive sectors leading → constructive. Expect follow-through; favor longs and breakouts.

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLK, XLF, XLI.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

entry_pullback.label: Breakout confirm
entry_pullback.note: Stop: enter on confirmation through the level, not in anticipation.

duration.valid_until: expected ~5 days, valid up to ~12 days

time_stop.note: If neither stop nor target fills within ~12 days, the thesis has expired — exit at market.

decision.reason: Long S/R Breakout with a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF bullish. Trigger and evidence agree.
